_comment: US Costco warehouse coordinates for arrival prompts (M3). NOT YET COMPILED — Costco's own locator API is bot-gated (HTTP 403, and scraping it violates their ToS); OpenStreetMap Overpass was overloaded (504) at build time. Compile once with the query below when Overpass is healthy, or license a POI dataset. The app must degrade gracefully while this list is empty: no location UI is shown at all.
_compile_with: curl -s https://overpass-api.de/api/interpreter --data-urlencode 'data=[out:json][timeout:120];(node["shop"="wholesale"]["name"~"Costco"](24.0,-125.0,49.5,-66.0);way["shop"="wholesale"]["name"~"Costco"](24.0,-125.0,49.5,-66.0););out center tags;' | <map to schema below>
_attribution: When compiled from OpenStreetMap: © OpenStreetMap contributors, ODbL — attribution must appear in Settings.
